title: Grand Adventure
description: Takes you on a Grand Adventure - inspired by art and history
body:
The Grand Adventure

This mod is a storybased minecraft update, where you begin at s tructure, and use the resources provided to you to find the ancient castle.

Features:
Skimmable Rocks
Fairy Lights
Hot Air Balloons
Floating Lanterns
Chinese Lanterns
Spike Traps
Growth Moss
Duckweed
Rust
Koi Fish
Ancient Map + Koi gardens Map
4 New Music Discs (made by @knightrho on youtube)
The Totem Of Creation

Decorative structure based upon simon stalenhags artworks
Decorative road and car structures
Settlement structures
The Stacks - tall shipping container structures
The Adventurers Camp structure (acts as a tutorial to the mod)
Ruined Train structure
Ancient Ruins
Koi Gardens
Ancient Castle (AKA The Grand Castle)

-Warning-
This mod is NOT survival friendly, it involves an item that turns players to creative mode.

DO NOT use shaders unless you are ok with game crashes, as occasionally the totem chamber causes shader issues

To begin, check using the /locate command if a grandadventure:ancient_castle is within a few thousand blocks, as if it not locatable with commands, the maps won't work.
